_warning: HAND-AUTHORED. A sync script that overwrites this file is a bug. verified:false means Shawn has not confirmed the reveal chapters against the manga yet.
_why_this_file_exists: data/raw/haki.json defines only the three haki types — NO upstream source links haki to characters, and a character's haki is a story reveal with its own chapter. One row per (user, haki-type) fact, because reveals of different types land chapters apart (Kid's Conqueror lands on the Wano rooftop ~ch. 1010, five hundred chapters after his debut). Scope: only entities that can appear on the map (crew_presence.json members and characters). The haki values are our storage enum — the raw API names are translated and are deliberately not the storage form.
_semantics: canon_confidence rates the REVEAL-CHAPTER claim: canon = the story shows or states this person's haki there by name; derived = the feat is on-page there and the naming lands nearby or via another character's statement; guess = a defensible stamp on the first clear on-page feat. A person with no rows here reads as 'no haki revealed' under the haki lens.
_before_any_content_ships: Shawn must confirm every reveal chapter below against the manga and flip verified to true. Until then the UI renders these facts as unverified.

users.name: Shanks
users.source_ref: Hand-authored. Shanks boards the Moby Dick and his pressure drops Whitebeard's crew (~ch. 434) — the reader's first named brush with haki. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.
